components.name: AppLogo
Box
FlexCol
FlexRow

propertiesClass.name: baseClasses
propertiesClass.defaultValue: signal('flex flex-row grow w-full overflow-hidden h-full items-center')

components.name: Image
InputCommon
InputText
Layout
components.templateData:
<vn-flex-col #vp="viewport" vnViewport>

    <!-- is movile viewport? -->
    @let isHandset = (vp.isHandset | async);

    <!-- is not mobile viewport?  -->
    @let isNotMobile = (vp.isNotMobile | async);

    <!-- is not mobile viewport?  -->
    @let isXSmall = (vp.isXSmall | async);

    <!-- Sidenav mode -->
    @let mode = (isHandset ? "over": "side");


    <!-- App toolbar  -->
    <mat-toolbar>
        <mat-toolbar-row>
            <!-- Menu toggle button -->
            <vn-flex-row>
                <button matIconButton (click)="drawer.toggle()">
                    @let menuIcon = drawer.opened ? 'menu_open' : 'menu';
                    <mat-icon>
                        {{ menuIcon }}
                    </mat-icon>
                </button>

                <!--  -->
                <!-- Toolbar left -->
                <ng-content select="[vnToolbarLeft]"></ng-content>

                <vn-flex-row></vn-flex-row>
                <!-- Toolbar right -->
                <ng-content select="[vnToolbarRight]"></ng-content>
            </vn-flex-row>
        </mat-toolbar-row>
    </mat-toolbar>


    <!-- Sidenav container  -->
    <mat-sidenav-container class="w-full flex grow">

        <!-- Sidenav  -->
        <mat-sidenav #drawer [opened]="isNotMobile" [mode]="mode" [class.!w-full]="isXSmall" [class.!w-96]="!isXSmall">
            <vn-flex-col>
                <!-- Logo/toolbar -->
                <mat-toolbar>
                    <vn-flex-row>
                        <ng-content select="[vnSidenavLogo]">
                            <vn-app-logo></vn-app-logo>
                        </ng-content>

                        <!-- if is handset then show menu.close button -->
                        @if(isHandset){
                        <vn-flex-col></vn-flex-col>
                        <!-- Mobile drawer close button -->
                        <button matIconButton (click)="drawer.close()">
                            <mat-icon> close </mat-icon>
                        </button>
                        }
                    </vn-flex-row>
                </mat-toolbar>

                <!-- Menu items -->
                <vn-flex-col>
                    <!-- Sidenav content  -->
                    <vn-flex-col (click)="isHandset && drawer.close()">
                        <!-- Sidenav top -->
                        <ng-content select="[vnSidenavTop]"></ng-content>
                        <!-- Sidenav bottom -->
                        <ng-content select="[vnSidenavBottom]"></ng-content>
                        <!--  -->
                    </vn-flex-col>
                </vn-flex-col>
            </vn-flex-col>
        </mat-sidenav>


        <!--  -->
        <mat-sidenav-content>

            <!-- Main content  -->
            <vn-flex-col>
                <!-- Content  -->
                <vn-flex-col>
                    <!-- Content top -->
                    <ng-content select="[vnContentTop]"></ng-content>
                    <!-- Bottom Content  -->
                    <ng-content select="[vnContentBottom]"></ng-content>
                </vn-flex-col>


                <!--  -->
            </vn-flex-col>
            <!--  -->
        </mat-sidenav-content>
        <!--  -->
    </mat-sidenav-container>

    <!-- Statusbar -->
    <mat-toolbar>
        <mat-toolbar-row>
            <vn-flex-row>
                <!-- Statusbar left -->
                <ng-content select="[vnStatusbarLeft]"></ng-content>
                <vn-flex-row></vn-flex-row>
                <!-- Statusbar right -->
                <ng-content select="[vnStatusbarRight]"></ng-content>
            </vn-flex-row>
        </mat-toolbar-row>
    </mat-toolbar>


</vn-flex-col>
